# llms.txt — DVAS Machine-Readable Index

project: DVAS
version: 0.1.0
full_name: Distilled Video Annotation Specialist
description: AI-powered video annotation platform generating gold-standard training data for VLM training via teacher-student distillation
language: python
architecture_style: layered
python_version: "3.10+"

# Key documents
boot_protocol: AGENTS.md
navigation_hub: docs/INDEX.md
constitution: docs/architecture/constitution.md
top_level_design: docs/architecture/top-level-design.md
changelog: docs/changelog/CHANGELOG.md

# Scripts
scripts:
  - init_project.py
  - check_doc_anchors.py
  - check_known_gaps.py
  - get_subsystem_status.py

# Entry Points
cli_entry: "python -m dvas"
annotate_epic: "python -m dvas annotate epic --split train"
export_llava: "python -m dvas export --format llava"

# External Dependencies
data_source: EPIC-KITCHENS
teacher_models:
  - gpt-5.5 (user-specified latest)
  - claude-opus-4-8 (user-specified latest)
  - qwen2.5-vl-7b / qwen2.5-vl-72b (via Together)
student_base: Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct

# Recent Fixes (2026-06-18)
# - src/dvas/pipeline/core.py: GenerationResult status handling (is_recoverable, is_timeout, is_rate_limited)
# - src/dvas/pipeline/core.py: Checkpoint-storage consistency checks
# - src/dvas/pipeline/builder.py: Type conversion for Object/Action/QAPair
# - src/dvas/pipeline/checkpoint.py: Corrupted checkpoint recovery with backup
# - src/dvas/core/concurrency.py: AsyncIteratorBridge timeout + sentinel fixes
# - src/dvas/core/saga.py: on_failure callback for checkpoint coordination
# - src/dvas/core/concurrency.py: FrameEncoderPool BGR/RGB conversion control
# - src/dvas/data/video_loader.py: LRU metadata cache (max 1000 entries)
# - src/dvas/persistence/indexed_store.py: Thread-local SQLite connections
